name: Death by Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine eggs, water, oil, and sour cream. Beat until fluffy.
4. Add the cake mix and dry pudding mix; beat until well blended.
5. Stir in chocolate morsels.
6. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 5 minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely before removing from pan.
9. Enjoy!
